exercises.name: barbell Bicep Curl
instructions: Set up for the barbell Bicep Curl using barbell.
Maintain proper posture throughout the movement.
Move through a controlled range of motion.
Pause briefly at the hardest portion of the lift.
Return to the starting position under control.
exercises.description: barbell Bicep Curl is a widely used barbell-based exercise that primarily targets the biceps. It is commonly included in strength and hypertrophy programs.
